flashcards.definition: Largest harvest that can be taken from a fish stock indefinitely without depleting it.
Harvesting fish faster than they can reproduce, leading to population decline.
Unintended capture of non-target species (dolphins, sea turtles, sharks) in fishing operations.
Farming of fish, shellfish, or aquatic plants; provides >50% of fish consumed globally.
Destructive fishing method dragging heavy nets along the ocean floor, damaging seafloor habitats.
